name: The Permanent Loan
effect: Acquire a technology resource on a temporary basis with no defined return condition. This card is considered provisional.

clauses.name: RENEWAL CLAUSE
clauses.rule: At the start of each quarter: The loan is silently extended without documentation.

clauses.name: OWNERSHIP AMBIGUITY EFFECT
clauses.rule: If the original owner requests return: The request is routed to a team that no longer exists.

clauses.name: INTEGRATION PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If the technology becomes load-bearing: Its provisional status is never formally revised.

witness_quote: We just never gave it back.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Is there a ticket for this anywhere?
